title: Constancy
description:
The Perfect Modpack for Roleplay Servers.

Enhanced roleplay experience with vanilla gameplay.
body:
# Welcome to Constancy!

This is a simple lightweight modpack designed to make roleplaying in Minecraft easier and more immersive for everyone! Constancy is designed with vanilla at heart so nothing is added to the game, and players running vanilla can join the same server as you!

## Server-side features:
- Simple Voice Chat
- JourneyMap admin console
- No re-log for SkinShuffle
- Show Me Your Skin! Sync (Supposedly)

These features require that the Server pack be installed on the server, servers without mods will not support these features.

### Essentials
This includes only what is absolutely necessary to play on the official Constancy Minecraft server.  Use if your pc is not very good.

### Recommended
Easy to set up, makes roleplay a bit easier. Unless you're certain you shouldn't, get this one.

### Advanced
Might require some tweaking. Includes some shaders, dynamic lights, and other fun nerdy stuff.

### Server
This pack is meant to be downloaded and run on a Minecraft Server, not for use by players. This is necessary to achieve the server-side features mentioned above.
